message:
Command `
# Kill the current PnR run (RCX extraction)
echo "=== Killing current PnR processes ==="
pkill -f "librelane" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2
pkill -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2

# Verify all killed
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2}'
echo "Done killing processes"
` executed with exit code -1.

sleep 2

echo "Done killing processes"
", "timeout": 15}
